description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI - Linux via APT that runs on push and pull request events across multiple Ubuntu versions (22.04, 20.04, 18.04). For each version, check out the repository with submodules, set up ccache, and install dependencies. Then, register robotpkg, install CasADi, and configure the build environment. Run CMake to build and test the project, and finally, test packaging and uninstall the project.
